case_title: CAPITAL ONE N.A. VS. JUAN C. OCAMPO et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION FLINT C. ZIDE FILED RE: CCP 1033 B (1) & (2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OCAMPO, JUAN C. $4,117.17 PRINCIPAL, $1,227.26 INTEREST, $551.45 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,895.88, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE N.A. SERVED MAY-26-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT OCAMPO, JUAN C.
DECLARATION FLINT C. ZIDE FILED RE: WAIVER OF INTEREST EXCESS OF 10% AND ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT OCAMPO, JUAN C. DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-26-2010
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE N.A. SERVED MAY-24-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT OCAMPO, JUAN C.
DECLARATION FLINT C. ZIDE FILED RE: INTEREST CALCULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE N.A.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $551.45 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT OCAMPO, JUAN C.
DECLARATION SHARISE HODGE FILED RE: CCP 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE N.A.
